positive: A whimsical and deeply stylized illustration of a crescent moon guiding a cluster of glowing geometric celestial bodies through a nebula landscape. The style should be modern neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Emphasis on thick, contrasting lines and clean silhouettes. The color palette must be limited to deep indigo, luminous gold, electric teal, and pops of soft lavender. Composition should be perfectly centered, designed to wrap around an imaginary cylindrical area (like a t-shirt print). The foreground elements should be crisp and vectorized, suggesting magical, glowing constellations. High contrast, minimal gradients for print sharpness.
negative: blurry, bokeh, gradient, photo, realistic, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs
